sources.expression:
$wpdb->get_row(
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}blc_synch
					WHERE container_type = %s AND container_id = %d",
					$container[0],
					$container[1]
				),
				ARRAY_A
			)
$wpdb->get_results( "SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}blc_filters ORDER BY name ASC", ARRAY_A )

sinks.expression:
printf( '
%1$s
', $message )

printf( '
%1$s
', $message )

printf( '
%1$s
', $message )

printf( '

%1$s

', $message, $close_message )

wp_die(
				esc_html__( 'It seems there is some missing input', 'broken-link-checker' ),
				esc_html__( 'Invalid action', 'broken-link-checker' )
			)

wp_die(
				esc_html__( 'No user found for given input data.', 'broken-link-checker' ),
				esc_html__( 'Invalid action', 'broken-link-checker' )
			)

array_filter(
					preg_split(
						'/[\s\r\n]+/', //split on newlines and whitespace
						$cleanPost['exclusion_list'],
						- 1,
						PREG_SPLIT_NO_EMPTY //skip empty values
					)
				)

printf( '
  • %s
    • ', esc_attr( $section_id ), esc_attr( $section_id ), esc_attr( $section_name ), $section_name )

printf(
												__( 'Every %s hours', 'broken-link-checker' ),
												sprintf(
													'<input type="text" name="check_threshold" id="check_threshold" value="%d" size="5" maxlength="5" />',
													$this->conf->options['check_threshold']
												)
											)
printf( __( 'Configure External Links settings.', 'broken-link-checker' ), admin_url( 'admin.php?page=wpel-settings-page' ) )

printf( __( 'Install the free External Links plugin to control if external links open in a new tab, and their nofollow, noopener and UGC options.', 'broken-link-checker' ), 'plugin-install.php?fix-install-button=1&tab=plugin-information&plugin=wp-external-links&TB_iframe=true&width=772&height=691' )
printf( __( 'Example : Lorem ipsum broken link, dolor sit amet.', 'broken-link-checker' ), ' href="#" class="broken_link" onclick="return false;"' )
printf( __( 'Example : Lorem ipsum removed link, dolor sit amet.', 'broken-link-checker' ), ' class="removed_link"' )
printf( __( 'Use your own %1$sapi key%2$s for checking youtube links.', 'broken-link-checker' ), '', '' )

printf( '

', esc_attr( $status ), in_array( $status, $enabled_post_statuses ) ? ' checked="checked"' : '', $status_object->label )

printf(
												__( '%s seconds', 'broken-link-checker' ),
												sprintf(
													'<input type="text" name="timeout" id="blc_timeout" value="%d" size="5" maxlength="3" />',
													$this->conf->options['timeout']
												)
											)

printf( '

', esc_attr( $capability ), checked( $capability, $this->conf->get( 'dashboard_widget_capability' ), false ), $title )

printf( '

', $action, $text, checked( $enabled, true, false ) )

printf(
													'<input type="text" name="server_load_limit" id="server_load_limit" value="%s" size="5" maxlength="5"/> ',
													$value
												)

printf( __( 'Link checking will be suspended if the average server load rises above this number. Leave this field blank to disable load limiting.', 'broken-link-checker' ), 'http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Load_(computing)' )

printf(
												'<input name="target_resource_usage" value="%d"
						type="range" min="1" max="100" id="target_resource_usage">',
												$target_resource_usage * 100
											)
printf( ' | %s', esc_attr( $module_id ), __( 'Configure', 'broken-link-checker' ) )

printf(
				'<label class="%s">
					<input type="checkbox" name="%s[%s]" id="module-checkbox-%s"%s /> %s
				</label>',
				esc_attr( $label_class ),
				$name_prefix,
				esc_attr( $module_id ),
				esc_attr( $module_id ),
				$checked,
				$module_data['Name']
			)

printf( '

%1$s

%3$s | %5$s

', __( 'The "Warnings" page lists problems that are probably temporary or suspected to be false positives.
Warnings that persist for a long time will usually be reclassified as broken links.', 'broken-link-checker' ), esc_attr( add_query_arg( $notice_name, '0' ) ), _x( 'Hide notice', 'admin notice under Tools - Broken links - Warnings', 'broken-link-checker' ), esc_attr( admin_url( 'admin.php?page=link-checker-settings#blc_warning_settings' ) ), _x( 'Change warning settings', 'a link from the admin notice under Tools - Broken links - Warnings', 'broken-link-checker' ) )
printf( __( "Oops, I can't find the link %d", 'broken-link-checker' ), intval( $_POST['link_id'] ) )
printf( __( "Oops, I can't find the link %d", 'broken-link-checker' ), intval( $_POST['link_id'] ) )

printf(
					'<th scope="col" class="%s"%s>%s</th>',
					implode( ' ', $column_classes ),
					isset( $column['id'] ) ? ' id="' . $column['id'] . '"' : '',
					$heading
				)

printf(
				'<tr id="blc-row-%s" class="blc-row %s" data-days-broken="%d" data-can-edit-url="%d" data-can-edit-text="%d"%s>',
				$link->link_id,
				$rowclass,
				$days_broken,
				$can_edit_url ? 1 : 0,
				$can_edit_text ? 1 : 0,
				$data_link_text
			)

printf(
							'<time datetime="%s">%s</time>',
							esc_attr( date( 'c', $last_check ) ), //phpcs:ignore WordPress.DateTime.RestrictedFunctions.date_date
							date_i18n( get_option( 'date_format' ), $last_check )
						)

printf(
							_n( 'This link has failed %d time.', 'This link has failed %d times.', $link->check_count, 'broken-link-checker' ),
							$link->check_count
						)

printf(
							__( 'This link has been broken for %s.', 'broken-link-checker' ),
							blcUtility::fuzzy_delta( $delta )
						)

printf(
				'<table class="mini-status" title="%s">',
				esc_attr( __( 'Show more info about this link', 'broken-link-checker' ) )
			)
printf( ' %s %s ', $status['code'], empty( $link->http_code ) ? '' : $link->http_code, $status['text'] )
printf( '%s', esc_attr( __( 'Show more info about this link', 'broken-link-checker' ) ), _x( 'Details', 'link in the "Status" column', 'broken-link-checker' ) )
printf( '%2$s', esc_attr( $link->final_url ), esc_html( $link->final_url ) )

$wpdb->query(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"INSERT INTO {$wpdb->prefix}blc_synch( container_id, container_type, synched, last_synch)
				VALUES( %d, %s, %d, NOW() )
				ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE synched = VALUES(synched), last_synch = VALUES(last_synch)",
				$this->container_id,
				$this->container_type,
				1
			)
		)

$wpdb->query(
			$wpdb->prepare(
				"INSERT INTO {$wpdb->prefix}blc_synch( container_id, container_type, synched, last_synch)
			  	VALUES( %d, %s, %d, '0000-00-00 00:00:00' )
			  	ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE synched = VALUES(synched)",
				$this->container_id,
				$this->container_type,
				0
			)
		)

$wpdb->get_row(
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}blc_synch
					WHERE container_type = %s AND container_id = %d",
					$container[0],
					$container[1]
				),
				ARRAY_A
			)

$wpdb->query(
					$wpdb->prepare(
						"INSERT INTO {$wpdb->prefix}blc_instances
						( link_id, container_type, container_id, container_field, parser_type, link_text, link_context, raw_url )
						VALUES( %d, %s, %d, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s )",
						$this->link_id,
						$this->container_type,
						$this->container_id,
						$this->container_field,
						$this->parser_type,
						$this->link_text,
						$this->link_context,
						$this->raw_url
					)
				)

$wpdb->query(
					$wpdb->prepare(
						"UPDATE {$wpdb->prefix}blc_instances
						SET
						link_id = %d,
						container_type = %s,
						container_id = %d,
						container_field = %s,
						parser_type = %s,
						link_text = %s,
						link_context = %s,
						raw_url = %s
						WHERE instance_id = %d",
						$this->link_id,
						$this->container_type,
						$this->container_id,
						$this->container_field,
						$this->parser_type,
						$this->link_text,
						$this->link_context,
						$this->raw_url,
						$this->instance_id
					)
				)
$wpdb->get_results( "SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}blc_filters ORDER BY name ASC", ARRAY_A )

$wpdb->query(
				$wpdb->prepare(
					"UPDATE {$wpdb->postmeta} 
					SET `meta_value` = REPLACE(`meta_value`, %s, %s) 
					WHERE `meta_key` = '_elementor_data' 
					AND `post_id` = %d 
					AND `meta_value` LIKE %s",
					$escaped_old_url,
					$escaped_new_url,
					$post_id,
					'%' . $wpdb->esc_like( $escaped_old_url ) . '%'
				)
			)

preg_replace(
			array(
				'/([\?&]PHPSESSID=\w+)$/i', // remove session ID
				'/(#[^\/]*)$/',             // and anchors/fragments
				'/&/',                  // convert improper HTML entities
				'/([\?&]sid=\w+)$/i',       // remove another flavour of session ID
				'/' . $ltrm . '/',          // remove Left-to-Right marks that can show up when copying from Word.
			),
			array( '', '', '&', '', '' ),
			$url
		)

sanitizers.expression:
$wpdb->prepare(
				"SELECT meta_key, meta_value as content FROM {$wpdb->postmeta} WHERE post_id=%d AND meta_value LIKE %s",
				$post_id,
				'%' . $wpdb->esc_like( $this->link->get_link() ) . '%'
			)
esc_js( _x( 'Archived page from %s (via the Wayback Machine)', 'link suggestions', 'broken-link-checker' ) )
esc_js( __( '%d instances of the link were successfully modified.', 'broken-link-checker' ) )
esc_js( __( "However, %d instances couldn't be edited and still point to the old URL.", 'broken-link-checker' ) )
esc_js( __( 'The link could not be modified.', 'broken-link-checker' ) )
esc_js( __( 'Error: Link URL must not be empty.', 'broken-link-checker' ) )
esc_js( __( 'Are you sure you want to unlink and remove this link from all posts?', 'broken-link-checker' ) )
esc_js( __( '%d instances of the link were successfully unlinked.', 'broken-link-checker' ) )
esc_js( __( 'The plugin failed to remove the link.', 'broken-link-checker' ) )
esc_js( __( 'Enter a name for the new custom filter', 'broken-link-checker' ) )

esc_js(
			html_entity_decode(
				__( "You are about to delete the current filter.\n'Cancel' to stop, 'OK' to delete", 'broken-link-checker' ),
				ENT_QUOTES,
				get_bloginfo( 'charset' )
			)
		)

esc_js(
					html_entity_decode(
						__( "Are you sure you want to delete all posts, bookmarks or other items that contain any of the selected links? This action can't be undone.\n'Cancel' to stop, 'OK' to delete", 'broken-link-checker' ),
						ENT_QUOTES,
						get_bloginfo( 'charset' )
					)
				)

esc_js(
					html_entity_decode(
						__( "Are you sure you want to remove the selected links? This action can't be undone.\n'Cancel' to stop, 'OK' to remove", 'broken-link-checker' ),
						ENT_QUOTES,
						get_bloginfo( 'charset' )
					)
				)
esc_js( __( 'Select one or more links to edit.', 'broken-link-checker' ) )
esc_attr( __( 'Show more info about this link', 'broken-link-checker' ) )
esc_attr( __( 'Show more info about this link', 'broken-link-checker' ) )
esc_attr( __( 'Remove this link from all posts', 'broken-link-checker' ) )
esc_attr( __( 'Remove this link from the list of broken links and mark it as valid', 'broken-link-checker' ) )
esc_attr( __( 'Hide this link and do not report it again unless its status changes', 'broken-link-checker' ) )

$wpdb->prepare(
				'SELECT instance_id FROM `' . $wpdb->prefix . 'blc_instances` WHERE container_id = %d AND container_type = %s',
				$post_id,
				$post_type
			)
esc_attr( __( 'Move this item to the Trash' ) )

$wpdb->prepare(
				"INSERT INTO {$wpdb->prefix}blc_synch( container_id, container_type, synched, last_synch)
				VALUES( %d, %s, %d, NOW() )
				ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE synched = VALUES(synched), last_synch = VALUES(last_synch)",
				$this->container_id,
				$this->container_type,
				1
			)

$wpdb->prepare(
				"INSERT INTO {$wpdb->prefix}blc_synch( container_id, container_type, synched, last_synch)
			  	VALUES( %d, %s, %d, '0000-00-00 00:00:00' )
			  	ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE synched = VALUES(synched)",
				$this->container_id,
				$this->container_type,
				0
			)

$wpdb->prepare(
						"INSERT INTO {$wpdb->prefix}blc_instances
						( link_id, container_type, container_id, container_field, parser_type, link_text, link_context, raw_url )
						VALUES( %d, %s, %d, %s, %s, %s, %s, %s )",
						$this->link_id,
						$this->container_type,
						$this->container_id,
						$this->container_field,
						$this->parser_type,
						$this->link_text,
						$this->link_context,
						$this->raw_url
					)

$wpdb->prepare(
						"UPDATE {$wpdb->prefix}blc_instances
						SET
						link_id = %d,
						container_type = %s,
						container_id = %d,
						container_field = %s,
						parser_type = %s,
						link_text = %s,
						link_context = %s,
						raw_url = %s
						WHERE instance_id = %d",
						$this->link_id,
						$this->container_type,
						$this->container_id,
						$this->container_field,
						$this->parser_type,
						$this->link_text,
						$this->link_context,
						$this->raw_url,
						$this->instance_id
					)

$wpdb->prepare(
					"UPDATE {$wpdb->postmeta} 
					SET `meta_value` = REPLACE(`meta_value`, %s, %s) 
					WHERE `meta_key` = '_elementor_data' 
					AND `post_id` = %d 
					AND `meta_value` LIKE %s",
					$escaped_old_url,
					$escaped_new_url,
					$post_id,
					'%' . $wpdb->esc_like( $escaped_old_url ) . '%'
				)
esc_attr( __( 'Move this item to the Trash' ) )
esc_js( sprintf( __( "You are about to delete this link '%s'\n  'Cancel' to stop, 'OK' to delete." ), $bookmark->link_name ) )
esc_attr( __( 'Move this item to the Trash' ) )
